SBAR_Reporting.baseline: The patient's blood pressure is going up fast.
SBAR_Reporting.target: Clinical observation indicates a rapid escalation in systolic blood pressure; immediate pharmacological intervention is recommended.

Patient_Safety.baseline: I make sure the floor is dry to stop falls.
Patient_Safety.target: Implementation of environmental hazard mitigation protocols is mandatory to prevent fall-related adverse events.

Service_Recovery.baseline: I am sorry, I will fix your cabin problem now.
Service_Recovery.target: Please accept my apologies for the cabin facility oversight; I am currently facilitating a rectification to ensure your comfort is restored.

Anticipatory_Service.baseline: Do you need anything else for your trip?
Anticipatory_Service.target: May I provide further assistance to ensure your voyage experience remains seamless and exceeds your expectations?
